name: search
description: Access real-time information from the internet. Use this for ANY query requiring current data: sports scores, news, stock prices, weather, people, companies, or general web research.

tools.name: search_searxng
tools.description: Perform a real-time web search using the local SearXNG instance. This is the primary search tool — no API key, no rate limits, returns rich results with snippets and URLs. Use this for any world-state or current information request.
examples: search for the latest news on AI
look up the stock price of AAPL
find information about the mars rover

tools.name: read_page
tools.description: Fetch and extract the main text content from a URL using trafilatura. Use this after search_searxng when you need to read the full content of a page (e.g., a news article, a standings page).
examples: fetch the content of the link

url.description: The full URL to fetch and read (e.g. https://www.espn.com/nba/standings).

tools.name: configure_search
tools.description: Configure the web search engine settings.

tools.name: search_tavily
tools.description: Fallback web search via Tavily API. Use only when search_searxng is unavailable. Requires TAVILY_API_KEY in secrets.env.
